case_title: A. DIAMOND PRODUCTION INC. VS CHADHA, KHUSHWANT S.

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAILING TO KHUSHWANT S. CHADHA RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A. DIAMOND PRODUCTION INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHADHA, KHUSHWANT S. EVIDENCE SHOWED DEFT NEVER RECEIVED SATISFACTORY PRODUCT & PLTF COULD NOT PROVE DEFT HAD POSSESS- ION OF ANY REMAINING PRODUCT. DEFT ESTABLISHED HIS PAYMENTS HAVE EITHER BEEN RETURNED OR IN DISPUTE W/ A/EX EXCEPT FOR A $663.51 DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLTF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,282.86 FILED BY A. DIAMOND PRODUCTION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHADHA, KHUSHWANT S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
